ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NFL team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the NFL season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoff season */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoff season */,
  "super_bowl" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season ended with a Super Bowl appearance */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the Super Bowl */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage for the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in the season */,
  "net_points" INTEGER /* Net points scored minus points allowed */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Record for home games in the season */,
  "road_record" TEXT /* Record for away games in the season */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Record against divisional opponents in the season */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* Record against conference opponents in the season */,
  "non_conference_record" TEXT /* Record against non-conference opponents in the season */,
  "current_streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak */,
  "last_five_games" TEXT /* Record in the last five games */,
  "conference_win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage within the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within its division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within its conference */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the team */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "playoff_win_percentage" REAL /* Playoff winning percentage */,
  "super_bowl_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team appeared in the Super Bowl */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game is part of */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "away_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game took place */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player is active for */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of the current injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Yards passed by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Yards rushed by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Yards received by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions_caught" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions caught by the player */,
  "fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles forced by the player */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered by the player */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns */,
  "punt_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained from punt returns */,
  "kickoff_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kickoff returns */,
  "kickoff_return_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained from kickoff returns */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "extra_points_made" INTEGER /* Number of extra points made */,
  "extra_points_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of extra points attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, scout) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* User's contact address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
